methods.description: Process for growing and preparing Fragilaria radians and Ulnaria danica strains for morphological study.

steps.description: Cells were grown on the DM medium in flasks at 10°C and 16 μmol/m2*sec of light intensity using 12/12 h artificial light/dark cycle.
steps.searchable_summary: grow cell cultures under controlled temperature and light conditions

steps.description: Clonal cultures grown from one cell were used after several months of cultivation.
steps.searchable_summary: select clonal cultures for study after sufficient growth

methods.description: Procedure for preparing cell samples for scanning electron microscopy to study cell morphology.

steps.description: Cultures were sedimented on the Mini Spin centrifuge for 6 minutes at 3500 g.
steps.searchable_summary: centrifuge cell cultures to sediment cells

steps.description: The cell pellet was washed for 30 minutes at 95°C in 6% sodium dodecyl sulfate solution.
steps.searchable_summary: wash cell pellet in sodium dodecyl sulfate solution

steps.description: Cells were again centrifuged and the supernatant was removed; this stage was repeated three times.
The sediment was washed in distilled water five times and treated with concentrated nitric acid for 1 hour at 95°C.
steps.searchable_summary: wash sediment in distilled water and treat with nitric acid

steps.description: After that, it was thrice washed in ethanol and treated with 36% hydrochloric acid for 24 hours at room temperature.
steps.searchable_summary: wash in ethanol and treat with hydrochloric acid

steps.description: After the final treatment, valves were washed in distilled water at least five times, resuspended in 100 μl 70% ethanol, and placed on SEM stubs.
steps.searchable_summary: final wash and resuspend in ethanol for SEM preparation

steps.description: These plates were dried at room temperature and coated with gold.
steps.searchable_summary: dry and gold coat samples for SEM

methods.description: Procedure for analyzing cell morphology using scanning electron microscopy.

steps.description: Microscopy was performed using Quanta 200 scanning electron microscope.
All counts were taken on 200 randomly chosen valves.
